loading.title: Preparing your workspace
loading.description: Loading tools, layout, and document workflows. This usually takes just a moment.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: We hit an unexpected problem on this page. Redirecting you to support so you always have a safe fallback.

support.title: Need help with the site?
support.description: If a page fails to load or something looks broken, contact support and include what you were trying to do when it happened.

fileDropzone.dropzoneSubtitle: or click to browse from your device
fileDropzone.dropzoneHint: Upload your files from your device

hero.description: Merge, split, rotate, extract, watermark, rearrange, protect, unlock, compress, and convert files in one fast, private workspace.
hero.readyToolsSuffix: ready tools across editing, security, and conversion workflows.

sections.description: The everyday PDF actions people reach for most, arranged in a cleaner four-column desktop layout for faster scanning.
The protection and access controls teams use most, presented in the same clear workflow style as core PDF actions.
The most-used format conversion actions, aligned with the same card structure and scanning flow as the core tools section.

homeCard.title: Merge PDF
homeCard.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one clean output.

heroCard.title: Merge PDF
heroCard.description: Join reports, invoices, or scans into one polished file.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.28), transparent 60%)

page.title: Merge PDF
page.description: Upload multiple PDF files in the order you want, then generate one merged document.

fileInput.label: PDF Files
fileInput.dropzoneTitle: Drag & drop your PDF files here
fileInput.dropzoneSubtitle: or click to browse from your device
fileInput.dropzoneHint: Upload at least 2 PDF files • Max 25 MB each

page.title: Rotate PDF
page.description: Rotate all or specific pages by 90°, 180°, or 270°.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

homeCard.title: Extract Pages
homeCard.description: Select specific pages and export to a new PDF.

page.title: Extract Pages
page.description: Select specific pages and export them into a new PDF.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

homeCard.title: Split PDF
homeCard.description: Split by page ranges into separate files.

heroCard.title: Split PDF
heroCard.description: Break large documents into smaller, shareable parts.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(124, 108, 255, 0.24), transparent 60%)

page.title: Split PDF
page.description: Split a PDF into multiple files by page ranges.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

homeCard.title: Image to PDF
homeCard.description: Convert images into a single PDF document.

page.title: Image to PDF
page.description: Convert one or more images into a single PDF document.

fileInput.label: Image Files
fileInput.dropzoneSubtitle: or click to browse from your device
fileInput.dropzoneHint: JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, TIFF, WebP

homeCard.title: Watermark PDF
homeCard.description: Apply diagonal text watermark to every page.

page.title: Watermark PDF
page.description: Apply a text watermark to your PDF for branding or protection.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

homeCard.title: Rearrange Pages
homeCard.description: Drag and drop to reorder PDF pages.

page.title: Rearrange Pages
page.description: Drag and drop to reorder PDF pages, then download the rearranged document.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

orderSection.label: Page Order
orderSection.helperText: Drag pages to reorder on desktop, or use the arrow buttons on touch devices.

homeCard.title: Compress PDF
homeCard.description: Reduce file size while maintaining maximal quality.

heroCard.title: Compress PDF
heroCard.description: Reduce size for email, upload limits, and faster delivery.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(23, 199, 255, 0.22), transparent 60%)

page.title: Compress PDF
page.description: Reduce file size while optimizing for maximal PDF quality.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF to compress

homeCard.title: Protect PDF
homeCard.description: Encrypt your PDF file with a password.

page.title: Protect PDF
page.description: Encrypt your PDF with a password to prevent unauthorized access.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file to encrypt

homeCard.title: Unlock PDF
homeCard.description: Remove password encryption from your PDF documents.

page.title: Unlock PDF
page.description: Remove password encryption from your PDF document (you must know the password).

fileInput.label: Protected PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select an encrypted PDF file

homeCard.title: DOCX → PDF
homeCard.description: Convert Word documents to PDF with high-fidelity rendering.

page.title: DOCX to PDF
page.description: Convert Word documents (.docx) to PDF with high-fidelity rendering.

homeCard.title: PDF → DOCX
homeCard.description: Extract text from PDFs into editable Word docs.

heroCard.title: PDF → DOCX
heroCard.description: Turn PDFs into editable Word documents with one jump.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.2), transparent 60%)

page.title: PDF to DOCX
page.description: Extract text from a PDF and create an editable Word document.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file
fileInput.hint: Text content will be extracted into a Word document

homeCard.title: PDF → JPG
homeCard.description: Convert each PDF page into a JPG and extract as a ZIP file.

page.title: PDF to JPG
page.description: Convert each PDF page into a JPG image. Extract images packaged in a ZIP file.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF to convert

homeCard.title: PDF to Text
homeCard.description: Extract plain text from every PDF page.

heroCard.title: PDF to Text
heroCard.description: Extract plain text from PDFs for quick reuse.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.26), transparent 60%)

page.title: PDF to Text
page.description: Extract text from a PDF file into a UTF-8 text document.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

homeCard.title: Remove Metadata
homeCard.description: Remove metadata from a PDF copy for safer sharing.

heroCard.title: Remove Metadata
heroCard.description: Strip hidden document metadata before sharing.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.24), transparent 60%)

page.title: Remove Metadata
page.description: Create a clean PDF copy with document metadata removed.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

homeCard.title: Add Page Numbers
homeCard.description: Add page numbers with position and style controls.

heroCard.title: Add Page Numbers
heroCard.description: Number PDF pages with custom start and placement.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.24), transparent 60%)

page.title: Add Page Numbers
page.description: Stamp page numbers on each PDF page with configurable start, size, and position.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

homeCard.title: Repair PDF
homeCard.description: Attempt repair for malformed or problematic PDF files.

heroCard.title: Repair PDF
heroCard.description: Recover and clean malformed PDFs in one step.
heroCard.glow: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.24), transparent 60%)

page.title: Repair PDF
page.description: Try to repair corrupted or malformed PDFs and export a clean file.

fileInput.label: PDF File
fileInput.placeholder: Click to select a PDF file

footer.headline: PDF tools for clean, focused document work.
footer.description: Merge, split, convert, compress, watermark, and secure files in one streamlined workspace.

support.title: Contact
support.description: Questions, feedback, or issue reports can go directly to the contact below.
